# Denials RCI Ticket Template

Use this template to track top denial pattern tickets from `docs/denials_rci_ticket_pack_v1.html`.

| ticket_id | denial_bucket | pattern_text | owner | operational_lever | evidence_checklist | kpi | status | due_date | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| RCI-TKT-001 | AUTH_ELIG | <pattern> | Eligibility/Auth team | <lever> | <evidence> | Auth pass rate before submission | NEW | YYYY-MM-DD | |
| RCI-TKT-002 | CODING_DOC | <pattern> | Coding/CDI | <lever> | <evidence> | Coding correction hit rate | IN_PROGRESS | YYYY-MM-DD | |
| RCI-TKT-003 | OTHER_PROXY | <pattern> | RCM analyst review | <lever> | <evidence> | Unclassified denial share | BLOCKED | YYYY-MM-DD | |

Status values: `NEW`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `BLOCKED`, `RESOLVED`.
